description: Edit an existing message in a Slack channel. Requires the channel id and message timestamp (`ts`), typically returned by slack_post_message or from message metadata.

channel_id.description: Slack channel ID containing the message (same format as slack_post_message), not the human-readable name.

message_ts.description: Message timestamp identifying the message to update (Slack `ts` field), e.g. from a prior post reply or Slack API listing.

text.description: Replacement plain-text body (Slack mrkdwn is supported).
